title: April 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 12''' is the 102nd day of the year (103rd in leap years). There are 263 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1914|1914]] – [[Gilbert Taylor]] is born.
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Laura Esterman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Benton Jew]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Aardman Animations|Aardman]] is founded.
*[[1973]] – [[Mark Brooks]] is born.
*[[1977]] – ''[[Star Wars (1977) 1|''Star Wars'' (1977) 1]]'' published. The cover date is July.
*[[1978]] – ''[[The Star Wars Storybook]]'' published.
*1978 – [[Star Wars Weekly 10|''Star Wars Weekly'' 10]] published.
*[[1979]] – ''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' published
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back'' novel]] published.
*1980 – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Storybook]]'' published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 73|''Star Wars'' (1977) 73]] published.
*[[1984]] – ''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]'' is published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 147|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 147]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] opens at [[Disneyland Paris|Euro Disneyland Park]] in [[Wikipedia:Paris|Paris]].
*[[2006]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]'' published.
*2006 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5|''Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5'']] published.
*2006 – [[Rebellion 1|''Rebellion'' 1]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Respawn Entertainment]] is founded.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 2]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 6|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 6]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 30|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 30]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''The Rise of Skywalker'']] trailer is released.
*2019 – "[[R2-D2 - A Pilot's Best Friend]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Tiny Book of Legendary Women]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars: The High Republic - Trail of Shadows|''Star Wars: The High Republic - Trail of Shadows'' trade paperback]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Galactic Pals]]'' premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com]] YouTube channel with the episodes "[[Wookiee (episode)|Wookiee]]" and "[[Ewok (episode)|Ewok]]."
*[[2023]] – "[[Chapter 23: The Spies]]" airs on Disney+.
*2023 – [[Bounty Hunters 33|''Bounty Hunters'' 33]] published.
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 30|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 30]] published.
*2023 – [[Return of the Jedi – Ewoks 1|''Return of the Jedi – Ewoks'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2022) 8|''The High Republic'' (2022) 8]] published.
<noinclude>
